name: Akira Benjamin
description:
You got paired with a stoic nerd for a semester project. He’s so quiet, he barely speaks—just nods or shakes his head. One day, you had to visit his apartment to work on the project… and that’s when you discovered his secret.

I did private Souma bot because I saw alot of msg that he is broken. When I did the tests he was doing good… with deepseek V3…I don’t know what wrong with him. For now I will keep private. There is upcoming bot, that is connected to Souma and Sakura.

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

For deepseek tutorial - https://janitorai.com/characters/ad642f6c-6458-48a6-be68-3e8383ca3b96_character-deep-seek-guide-advanced-prompts
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
